2606.05429.title: Minimizing the Hidden Cost of Scales: Graph-Guided Ultra-Low-Bit Quantization for Large Language Models
2606.05429.paper_summary: Post-training quantization (PTQ) is critical for the efficient deployment of large language models (LLMs). Recent ultra-low-bit PTQ methods rely on rigid weight-saliency assumptions or position heuristics, introducing substantial hidden scaling overhead. We propose SAGE-PTQ (Saliency-Aware Graph-guided Efficient PTQ), a novel ultra-low-bit quantization framework for LLMs that minimizes hidden scaling cost. SAGE-PTQ separates salient and unsalient weights using distributional statistics, then models subsampled unsalient weights as a sparse graph to estimate the optimal number of groups per layer. SAGE-PTQ applies dual-mode quantization, assigning multi-bit precision to salient weights and binarizing unsalient weights. To reduce scaling overhead, SAGE-PTQ uses one per-channel scale for salient weights and one scalar per unsalient group. Finally, SAGE-PTQ implements adaptive saliency thresholding to select the optimal saliency ratio per matrix. SAGE-PTQ achieves 1.03 weight bits and only 0.004 scaling bits per matrix on average, outperforming state-of-the-art methods such as BiLLM and PB-LLM. On LLaMA-3-8B, SAGE-PTQ achieves 6.74 WikiText2 perplexity, compared to 55.8 for BiLLM, while using less than 50% of BiLLM's GPU memory. On LLaMA-2-70B, SAGE-PTQ provides 1.5x faster decoding on one NVIDIA L40 GPU, demonstrating practical inference efficiency.
2606.05429.paper_summary_zh: 後訓練量化（PTQ）對於大型語言模型（LLMs）的高效部署至關重要。最近的超低位PTQ方法依賴於嚴格的權重顯著性假設或位置啟發式，這引入了大量隱藏的縮放開銷。我們提出了SAGE-PTQ（顯著性感知圖引導高效PTQ），這是一個新穎的超低位量化框架，旨在最小化隱藏的縮放成本。SAGE-PTQ使用分佈統計來區分顯著和不顯著的權重，然後將子取樣的不顯著權重建模為稀疏圖，以估計每層的最佳組數。SAGE-PTQ應用雙模式量化，為顯著權重分配多位精度，並將不顯著權重二值化。為了減少縮放開銷，SAGE-PTQ對顯著權重使用每通道一個縮放因子，對每個不顯著組使用一個標量。最後，SAGE-PTQ實施自適應顯著性閾值，選擇每個矩陣的最佳顯著性比率。SAGE-PTQ在每個矩陣上平均達到1.03的權重位數和僅0.004的縮放位數，超越了最先進的方法，如BiLLM和PB-LLM。在LLaMA-3-8B上，SAGE-PTQ達到6.74的WikiText2困惑度，而BiLLM為55.8，同時使用的GPU內存不到BiLLM的50%。在LLaMA-2-70B上，SAGE-PTQ在一個NVIDIA L40 GPU上提供了1.5倍的解碼速度，展示了實際推理效率。
2606.05429.author: Rayyan Abdalla et.al.
2606.05429.authors: Rayyan Abdalla, Amir Hussein, Min Wu, Dinesh Manocha
